name: Ghibli New Tab
description: A minimal Ghibli-inspired new tab — clock, ambient music, floating particles.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; style-src 'self' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' https://images.unsplash.com data: blob:; media-src 'self' https://cdn.pixabay.com; connect-src 'self' https://images.unsplash.com https://cdn.pixabay.com; script-src 'self'
